cost_name: PEM H₂ Purification & Drying — Industrial Offtake — 100 MW — Europe 2025

estimation.estimation_method: IRENA 2024 purification cost data. PEM produces 99.99% purity natively — industrial offtake (refinery, ammonia, steel DRI) requires only TSA drying to remove water vapor. No deoxo or PSA needed.

confidence.rationale: PEM's inherent purity advantage is well-documented (TC-PEM-001). Purification cost is minimal for industrial offtake — drying only.

exclusions: Fuel cell-grade purification for mobility (additional deoxo + PSA)
